# AI Tree Library

> A 3D constellation of curated AI tools, design inspiration, and creative resources. Hand-picked by Elliot Daemon. 0 entries across 0 top-level categories. Each entry has its own page at https://aitreelibrary.com/<slug>.

Live constellation: https://aitreelibrary.com
Full machine-readable catalog: https://aitreelibrary.com/llms-full.txt
Sitemap: https://aitreelibrary.com/sitemap.xml

## Curated landing pages

- [Legendary AI Tools](https://aitreelibrary.com/legendary): industry-defining picks across all categories
- [Hidden Gem AI Tools](https://aitreelibrary.com/hidden-gems): underrated, lesser-known tools worth attention
- Tag pages at https://aitreelibrary.com/tag/<slug>: one URL per shared descriptor across tools

---

This file follows the llmstxt.org convention. The companion 
https://aitreelibrary.com/llms-full.txt contains every entry with its long description, 
URL, rarity tier, tags, and category — meant for LLM ingestion.

Curated by Elliot Daemon (https://elliotdaemon.com)
Last updated: 2026-05-27T23:52:27.825Z
